title: atropis biflora
intro: Atropis biflora, also known as the "Bitter Fennel" or "Atropa", is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Atropis biflora include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing nausea. Herbal preparations of Atropis biflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
